details.description: Per-field detail, present for validation_error and friends.
details.title: Details

ErrorEnvelope.description: Outer envelope — every 4xx / 5xx response body conforms to this model.

delete.description:
Soft-delete: flip `disabled=true`. We never hard-delete users
so the audit_log FK remains valid.
